TRUMP NOMINATES KEVIN WARSH AS JEROME POWELL'S SUCCESSOR AT FED CHAIR; SENATE CONFIRMATION HEARING UNDERWAY** | YES | HIGH  
Kevin Warsh, Trump's pick to replace Powell (term ending May 2026), faced a polarized Senate Banking Committee hearing on April 21, 2026, defending Fed independence amid praise from Sen. Tim Scott and criticism from Sen. Elizabeth Warren on his 2008 crisis role[3][4]. Powell
